summary: Full e2e testing iteration 2: Calendly popup, Chi Sono section, contact form, blog, admin login, language switcher, premium design. All 15 backend tests pass. All critical frontend flows verified.
action_items: MINOR: Backend tests must be run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set (e.g. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://... pytest ...) otherwise BASE_URL is empty and all fail
critical_code_review_comments: Backend test env var issue: pytest fails if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not exported in shell - consider adding dotenv loading to conftest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendly popup CONFIRMED WORKING (window.Calendly loaded, initPopupWidget fires correctly). Chi Sono section present. Contact form present (POST /api/contact works). Blog page shows 3 articles. Admin login/dashboard fully functional. Language toggle (IT/EN) works. Design is premium dark theme with gradient text. Hero button testid is 'hero-cta-primary' (not hero-calendly-btn). Note: backend tests require REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env exported.

feature_test_results.calendly_popup_hero: PASS - window.Calendly loaded, popup opens correctly showing 30-min meeting calendar
feature_test_results.contact_form: PASS - form present and POST /api/contact returns 200
feature_test_results.admin_login: PASS - redirects to /admin dashboard after login
feature_test_results.design_premium: PASS - dark theme, gradient text, gradient buttons, stats cards all visible
